title: Establish and Maintain Baseline Configurations and Inventories
description: Establish and maintain baseline configurations and inventories of organizational systems (including hardware, software, firmware, and documentation) throughout the respective system development life cycles.

checks.name: Hardware Inventory is Documented
checks.purpose: Verify system hardware components (CPU, RAM, NIC, storage) are enumerable and match an authorized inventory baseline

checks.name: Installed Software Inventory is Captured
checks.purpose: Enumerate all installed applications and confirm they are documented in the authorized software inventory

checks.name: Firmware Versions are Documented
checks.purpose: Retrieve BIOS/UEFI version and verify it is documented and within an approved firmware baseline

checks.name: Baseline Configuration Document Exists
checks.purpose: Verify a documented configuration baseline (e.g., GPO export, DSC configuration, or CIS benchmark profile) exists and is applied to this system

checks.name: Hardware Inventory is Documented
checks.purpose: Verify system hardware components are enumerable and match an authorized inventory baseline

checks.name: Installed Software Inventory is Captured
checks.purpose: Enumerate all installed applications and roles and confirm they are documented in the authorized software inventory

checks.name: Firmware Versions are Documented
checks.purpose: Retrieve BIOS/UEFI version and verify it is documented and within an approved firmware baseline

checks.name: Baseline Configuration Document Exists
checks.purpose: Verify a documented server configuration baseline (e.g., GPO export, DSC, or STIG profile) exists and is applied to this system

checks.name: Installed Server Roles and Features are Inventoried
checks.purpose: Enumerate all installed Windows Server roles and features and confirm only authorized roles are present

checks.name: Hardware Inventory is Documented
checks.purpose: Use lshw or dmidecode to enumerate hardware and verify it matches an authorized inventory record

checks.name: Installed Package Inventory is Captured
checks.purpose: Enumerate all installed packages via rpm or dpkg and confirm they are documented in the authorized software baseline

checks.name: Firmware Versions are Documented
checks.purpose: Retrieve BIOS/UEFI version via dmidecode and verify it is documented in the approved firmware baseline

checks.name: Baseline Configuration Document Exists
checks.purpose: Verify a documented configuration baseline (e.g., Ansible playbook, CIS hardening script, or OSCAP profile) has been applied to this system

checks.name: Hardware Inventory is Documented
checks.purpose: Use lshw or dmidecode to enumerate hardware and verify it matches an authorized inventory record

checks.name: Installed Package Inventory is Captured
checks.purpose: Enumerate all installed packages via dpkg and confirm they are documented in the authorized software baseline

checks.name: Firmware Versions are Documented
checks.purpose: Retrieve BIOS/UEFI version via dmidecode and verify it is documented in the approved firmware baseline

checks.name: Baseline Configuration Document Exists
checks.purpose: Verify a documented configuration baseline (e.g., Ansible playbook, CIS hardening script, or OSCAP profile) has been applied to this system

remediation: Create and maintain a hardware and software inventory using SCCM, Lansweeper, or equivalent. Document approved BIOS/firmware versions. Establish a formal configuration baseline using GPO exports, DSC, Ansible, or CIS benchmark profiles and apply them consistently across all systems.
